final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing styled smartphone photo of Korean-cafe-style fashionable coffee and desserts, with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays in a Japanese diary-note aesthetic — no people.

Style/medium: needs a Korean café Instagram-story aesthetic shot on smartphone — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multiple elements (drinks + sweets) arranged for a flat-lay or café-table composition, with hand-drawn white-line annotations added over each element — arrows, dashed lines, and outline traces guiding the eye between subjects
Subject: must include fashionable coffee drink(s) and dessert/sweets items typical of a Korean café setting — no people
Scene/backdrop: must include a Korean café atmosphere as backdrop
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, warm, naturally-lit café atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a muted, trendy café-toned direction — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs the feel of a real smartphone snapshot — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include hand-drawn Japanese handwriting annotations (7 parts hiragana, 3 parts simple kanji) placed near each element, short diary-voice one-liners in the following spirit — drink annotations: taste / temperature / mood (e.g., さっぱり、やさしい甘さ); food annotations: texture / deliciousness (e.g., しっとり、さいこう); space annotation: atmosphere (e.g., まったり、いい時間); overall one-liner (e.g., しあわせすぎた〜); decorative accents: steam wisps, sparkle marks, small heart shapes, tiny emoticon-style doodles — placed moderately, preserving visual breathing room
Constraints: must preserve the hand-drawn white-pen line style — thin, single-stroke, slightly uneven lines tracing object outlines; annotations must feel like rough notebook scribbles, not printed type; overall finish must read as Instagram Stories × magazine rough-notes style — fashionable yet casual; do not overcrowd decorations
Avoid: people, faces, overly polished digital lettering, excessive decoration that eliminates white space
